details.Best Time to Take: With main meals for optimal nutrient absorption alongside food.
details.Other Therapies: Complements Berberine, R-Alpha Lipoic Acid, and Chromium & Vanadium for comprehensive diabetic nutritional support.
details.Precautions: Not a replacement for prescribed diabetic medications. Monitor blood glucose closely when starting. Inform your endocrinologist or diabetologist of all supplements being taken.

name: Acidophilus & bifidus 5 billion cfu
composition: lactobacillus acidophilus and bifidobacterium bifidum double strength 5 billion active cells per capsule

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: A dual-strain probiotic providing 5 billion CFU of beneficial bacteria to help support healthy gut bacterial balance, intestinal health, regular bowel function, and immune system support.
details.How It Works: L. acidophilus colonises the small intestine and produces lactic acid, maintaining an acidic environment that inhibits pathogens; B. bifidum colonises the large intestine, supports gut barrier function, produces B vitamins, and modulates immune responses.
details.Indications: Beneficial for individuals with antibiotic-associated diarrhoea, IBS, irregular bowel habits, traveller's diarrhoea, bloating, and those seeking general gut microbiome maintenance.
details.Dosage: 1–2 capsules daily. During antibiotic therapy, take 2 hours after each antibiotic dose.
details.Interactions: Take 2 hours apart from antibiotic medications to prevent inactivation. Generally safe with all medications.
details.Duration of Use: Can be taken continuously for ongoing microbiome support. Essential during and for 2 weeks after antibiotic courses.
details.Best Time to Take: On an empty stomach in the morning, or 30 minutes before meals.
details.Other Therapies: Pairs with Reliefibre (prebiotic) for synbiotic (probiotic + prebiotic) gut health support.
details.Precautions: Store in the refrigerator or cool dry place to maintain viability. Generally safe for all ages. Consult a doctor before use if severely immunocompromised.

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: Cyanocobalamin is the stable, cost-effective form of Vitamin B12 that supports red blood cell formation, prevents megaloblastic anaemia, and supports healthy nerve function.
details.How It Works: B12 is a cofactor for methionine synthase and L-methylmalonyl-CoA mutase — essential for DNA synthesis (red blood cell formation), myelin sheath maintenance (nerve protection), and homocysteine metabolism.
details.Indications: Essential for vegetarians, vegans, older adults (who absorb B12 less efficiently), individuals on metformin, those with pernicious anaemia, and anyone with documented B12 deficiency.
details.Dosage: 1000mcg once daily, or as directed by a healthcare professional.
details.Interactions: Proton pump inhibitors (PPIs), H2 blockers, and Metformin reduce B12 absorption — supplementation is essential in these patients.
details.Duration of Use: Long-term daily use is safe and often necessary for high-risk individuals. B12 excess is excreted by the kidneys.
details.Best Time to Take: Can be taken at any time of day.
details.Other Therapies: Pairs with Folate and B6 for complete homocysteine management and cardiovascular health.
details.Precautions: Very safe — excess is excreted. However, if B12 deficiency is suspected, always confirm with a blood test and consult a doctor. Cyanocobalamin requires conversion to active form — some individuals with MTHFR mutations absorb methylcobalamin better.

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: Methylcobalamin is the biologically active, immediately usable form of Vitamin B12. The high 5000mcg sublingual dose provides maximum absorption, ideal for correcting significant B12 deficiency and supporting neurological health.
details.How It Works: Unlike cyanocobalamin, methylcobalamin requires no conversion and is directly used in methylation reactions and myelin synthesis. Sublingual delivery bypasses gastric absorption issues that reduce B12 uptake in many people.
details.Indications: For individuals with confirmed B12 deficiency, pernicious anaemia, neurological symptoms of B12 deficiency, those on metformin or PPIs, and individuals with MTHFR gene polymorphisms who cannot convert cyanocobalamin.
details.Dosage: 5000mcg (1 tablet) dissolved under the tongue once daily or weekly as directed by a healthcare professional.
details.Interactions: Same as Cyanocobalamin B12.
details.Duration of Use: Long-term use is safe. High doses may be used initially to correct deficiency, then maintenance doses continued.
details.Best Time to Take: Morning use supports energy metabolism throughout the day.
details.Other Therapies: Part of a complete methylation support programme with Folate (5-MTHF), B6, and Magnesium.
details.Precautions: Very safe. Confirm deficiency with blood test. This high-dose formulation is particularly appropriate when absorption is compromised.

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: Biotin (Vitamin B7) at 5000mcg provides targeted support for healthy skin, stronger hair, and harder nails, while also supporting energy metabolism and nerve function.
details.How It Works: Biotin is an essential cofactor for carboxylase enzymes involved in fatty acid synthesis, gluconeogenesis, and amino acid metabolism. It is critical for keratin protein production in hair follicles and nails.
details.Indications: For individuals with brittle nails, hair thinning or loss, dry skin, and those with biotin deficiency (common in pregnancy, raw egg consumption, and antibiotic use).
details.Dosage: 5000mcg (1 capsule) once daily.
details.Interactions: May interfere with certain thyroid function tests and troponin assays — inform your doctor before blood tests. High-dose biotin is otherwise generally safe.
details.Duration of Use: Long-term use is safe. Results typically seen in hair and nails after 3–6 months of consistent use.
details.Best Time to Take: Can be taken at any time of day, with or without food.
details.Other Therapies: Pairs with Marine Collagen and Zinc for comprehensive hair, skin, and nail support.
details.Precautions: Inform your healthcare provider and laboratory before blood tests, as high-dose biotin can interfere with biotin-streptavidin immunoassays (falsely high or low results).

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: A high-potency 10,000mcg Biotin formulation for individuals seeking maximum support for hair growth, nail strength, and skin health. Particularly beneficial where significant biotin deficiency is suspected.
details.How It Works: Same as Biotin 5000mcg, but at a higher dose to more aggressively address deficiency states and provide stronger substrate availability for keratin synthesis.
details.Indications: For adults with significant hair loss, severely brittle nails, or confirmed biotin deficiency requiring higher-dose repletion.
details.Dosage: 10,000mcg (1 capsule) once daily.
details.Interactions: Same as Biotin 5000mcg — critically important: inform all healthcare providers and laboratories when on high-dose biotin.
details.Duration of Use: Reassess after 3–6 months. May switch to lower maintenance dose (5000mcg) once results are seen.
details.Best Time to Take: Any time, with or without food.
details.Other Therapies: As for Biotin 5000mcg.
details.Precautions: Critical: High-dose biotin causes significant interference with many laboratory blood tests (thyroid, cardiac troponin, hormone panels). Always disclose biotin supplementation to your doctor before any blood tests — stop biotin 48–72 hours before testing if possible.

name: Vitamin a 10,000iu
composition: vitamin a (palmitate from cod liver oil) 10,000iu (3000mcg rae)

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: Vitamin A is a fat-soluble vitamin essential for eye health (especially night vision), immune function, skin cell renewal, and gene expression. This supplement helps support vision, immune defences, and healthy skin.
details.How It Works: Retinol (Vitamin A) is converted to retinoic acid, which regulates gene expression for cell differentiation, immune cell maturation, and retinal visual pigment (rhodopsin) synthesis.
details.Indications: For individuals with Vitamin A deficiency, poor night vision, recurrent infections, dry or rough skin, and those requiring nutritional support for mucosal immune barriers.
details.Dosage: 10,000IU (1 softgel) once daily with a fat-containing meal. This is a therapeutic dose — not intended for indefinite daily use without medical guidance.
details.Interactions: Isotretinoin (Roaccutane) and other retinoids — avoid co-administration due to risk of toxicity. Fat-soluble — take with meals.
details.Duration of Use: At 10,000IU, limit to 2–4 weeks unless otherwise directed by a healthcare professional. Maintenance doses are lower (typically 2500–5000IU).
details.Best Time to Take: With the main meal of the day.
details.Other Therapies: Works synergistically with Zinc (required for Vitamin A transport) and Vitamin D for immune function.
details.Precautions: Vitamin A is fat-soluble and accumulates — do NOT exceed 10,000IU daily for prolonged periods. Pregnant women must NOT exceed 3000mcg (10,000IU) RAE daily — teratogenic risk. Regular monitoring recommended at high doses.

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol) is the most active and best-absorbed form of Vitamin D. It helps support a healthy immune system, aids in the development of strong teeth and bones, and helps prevent and correct Vitamin D deficiency — extremely common in Africa.
details.How It Works: D3 is converted in the liver to 25(OH)D, then in the kidneys to the active calcitriol, which regulates calcium absorption, modulates immune cell function, supports muscle function, and influences gene expression across most body tissues.
details.Indications: Essential for individuals with limited sun exposure, dark skin, obesity, malabsorption conditions, osteoporosis risk, frequent infections, and the general population given the high prevalence of deficiency.
details.Dosage: 1000IU daily for maintenance. 2500IU daily for deficiency correction. Dosing above 4000IU/day requires blood monitoring.
details.Interactions: Fat-soluble — take with meals. Corticosteroids deplete Vitamin D — supplementation important for those on long-term steroids. Always pair with Vitamin K2.
details.Duration of Use: Long-term daily supplementation is safe and often necessary, particularly in equatorial Africa despite sun exposure (skin pigmentation and indoor work reduce synthesis).
details.Best Time to Take: With the largest meal of the day for optimal fat-soluble absorption.
details.Other Therapies: Pair with Vitamin K2 to direct calcium to bones. Essential alongside Calcium and Magnesium for bone health.
details.Precautions: Vitamin D toxicity (hypercalcaemia) is rare but possible at very high doses (>10,000IU/day long-term). Test 25(OH)D levels before and during supplementation. Pair with K2 to avoid arterial calcium deposition.

name: Vitamin e 400iu
composition: vitamin e d-alpha tocopheryl acetate 400iu (268mg at)

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: Natural-source Vitamin E (d-alpha tocopheryl) is a powerful fat-soluble antioxidant that protects cell membranes from oxidative damage, helping to maintain overall good health and supporting cardiovascular and skin health.
details.How It Works: Vitamin E intercepts lipid peroxyl radicals in cell membranes, preventing oxidative chain reactions. It also supports immune function, platelet aggregation regulation, and gene expression.
details.Indications: For individuals with oxidative stress concerns, dry skin, cardiovascular risk factors, or inadequate dietary Vitamin E intake. Particularly beneficial in combination with Vitamin C.
details.Dosage: 400IU (1 softgel) once daily with a fat-containing meal.
details.Interactions: At higher doses, may enhance anticoagulant effects of warfarin. May reduce the efficacy of chemotherapy if taken concurrently — consult oncologist. Works synergistically with Vitamin C.
details.Duration of Use: Long-term use at 400IU is generally safe. Doses above 1000IU/day are not recommended without medical supervision.
details.Best Time to Take: With the main meal of the day.
details.Other Therapies: Pairs with Vitamin C and Selenium for comprehensive antioxidant support.
details.Precautions: Use with caution if on anticoagulant medications — may enhance bleeding risk at high doses. The natural d-alpha form (used here) is twice as potent as synthetic dl-alpha tocopherol.

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: Niacin (Nicotinic Acid) at 500mg supports cholesterol metabolism, nerve function, protein metabolism, and various enzyme activities. It is one of the most studied vitamins for cardiovascular health support.
details.How It Works: Niacin raises HDL ('good') cholesterol, reduces triglycerides, shifts LDL particle size to larger (less atherogenic) particles, and serves as a precursor to NAD+ (critical for energy metabolism and DNA repair).
details.Indications: For individuals with lipid imbalances (elevated triglycerides, low HDL), those seeking cardiovascular health support, and for broader metabolic and nerve health.
details.Dosage: 500mg once daily with meals. Start at lower doses if flushing is a concern.
details.Interactions: May enhance blood-pressure-lowering effects. Statins combined with high-dose niacin can increase myopathy risk — medical supervision required.
details.Duration of Use: Long-term use is appropriate under healthcare supervision. Annual liver function monitoring at sustained high doses is prudent.
details.Best Time to Take: With meals to reduce flushing and gastrointestinal discomfort.
details.Other Therapies: Part of a comprehensive cardiovascular programme alongside Omega-3 fatty acids and CoQ10.
details.Precautions: Flushing (skin redness and warmth) is common and harmless at higher doses — take aspirin 30 minutes before if troublesome. Use non-flush (inositol hexanicotinate) form if flushing is a concern. Monitor liver enzymes and blood sugar at high doses. Consult a doctor if on statin medications.

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: Vitamin C 1000mg in a time-release formulation maintains elevated blood levels of ascorbic acid throughout the day, providing sustained immune support, collagen synthesis support, and antioxidant protection.
details.How It Works: The time-release matrix slowly dissolves over 8–12 hours, maintaining higher, more consistent plasma Vitamin C levels compared to standard immediate-release tablets, improving utilisation and reducing urinary losses.
details.Indications: For adults needing robust, sustained immune support, those recovering from illness, smokers (increased Vitamin C requirements), and anyone seeking antioxidant protection throughout the day.
details.Dosage: 1000mg (1 tablet) once daily. Higher doses may be used short-term during illness.
details.Interactions: Enhances iron absorption — beneficial for those with iron deficiency; may cause excessive iron absorption in hereditary haemochromatosis. High doses may reduce anticoagulant effect of warfarin.
details.Duration of Use: Safe for long-term daily use. Water-soluble; excess is excreted.
details.Best Time to Take: Morning preferred for sustained immune support throughout the day.
details.Other Therapies: Pairs with Zinc and Elderberry for immune support. Works synergistically with Vitamin E as an antioxidant pair.
details.Precautions: Do not exceed 2000mg total daily Vitamin C. Very high doses may cause loose stools (bowel tolerance). Use with caution in kidney stones (oxalate-type) — stay well hydrated.

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: Vitamin C 500mg in a delicious, 100% fruit-chew format that makes daily supplementation enjoyable for adults and older children who prefer not to swallow tablets.
details.How It Works: Same as standard Vitamin C — immune support, collagen synthesis, antioxidant protection, and enhanced iron absorption.
details.Indications: Suitable for all adults and older children (over 12) as a daily immune and antioxidant supplement.
details.Dosage: 1–2 chewable tablets daily.
details.Interactions: Same as other Vitamin C formulations.
details.Duration of Use: Safe for long-term daily use.
details.Best Time to Take: Can be taken any time of day.
details.Other Therapies: Complements Zinc and daily multivitamin for comprehensive daily nutrition.
details.Precautions: Contains natural fruit sugars — consider this in diabetic individuals. Do not exceed total daily 2000mg Vitamin C. May cause dental sensitivity if chewed excessively without water.

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: Liposomal Vitamin C encapsulates ascorbic acid in phospholipid vesicles (liposomes), dramatically improving cellular absorption and bioavailability — delivering Vitamin C levels approaching intravenous administration without gastrointestinal side effects.
details.How It Works: Liposomes fuse with cell membranes, directly delivering Vitamin C intracellularly, bypassing the saturable intestinal transport mechanism that limits standard oral Vitamin C absorption. This results in 3–5x higher plasma levels than conventional oral Vitamin C.
details.Indications: For individuals seeking maximum immune defence, those recovering from serious illness or surgery, individuals with high oxidative stress, or those who experience GI discomfort with standard high-dose Vitamin C.
details.Dosage: 1000mg (1–2 softgels) once to twice daily, or as directed by a healthcare professional.
details.Interactions: Same as standard Vitamin C at equivalent doses.
details.Duration of Use: Safe for long-term daily use. Ideal for periods of high immune demand.
details.Best Time to Take: Can be taken any time, with or without food.
details.Other Therapies: Premium substitute for standard Vitamin C whenever maximum bioavailability is needed. Pairs with Glutathione and NAC for comprehensive antioxidant support.
details.Precautions: Contains soy lecithin (phospholipid source) — caution in severe soy allergy. Generally free of GI side effects unlike high-dose regular Vitamin C.

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: Methylcobalamin 1000mcg sublingual provides the active, immediately bioavailable form of B12 at a maintenance dose, supporting red blood cell formation, nerve health, and energy metabolism.
details.How It Works: Sublingual delivery of methylcobalamin directly enters circulation via the oral mucosa, bypassing the gastrointestinal absorption mechanism that fails in pernicious anaemia and many elderly individuals. Methylcobalamin is the neurologically active form, directly supporting myelin synthesis.
details.Indications: For B12 maintenance supplementation in vegetarians, vegans, older adults, and individuals on medications that reduce B12 absorption (metformin, PPIs). Also appropriate for nerve health support.
details.Dosage: 1000mcg (1 sublingual tablet) dissolved under the tongue once daily.
details.Interactions: Same as other B12 formulations.
details.Duration of Use: Safe for indefinite daily use — essential for lifelong supplementation in vegans and individuals with absorption difficulties.
details.Best Time to Take: Morning to support all-day energy and cognitive function.
details.Other Therapies: Part of a complete B-vitamin and methylation support programme.
details.Precautions: Confirm B12 status with blood tests if deficiency is suspected. Very safe profile. Methylcobalamin is preferred over cyanocobalamin for individuals with kidney impairment.

name: Omega-3 + ginkgo 60 caps
composition: fish oil 1000mg (epa 180mg/dha 120mg) + ginkgo extract 100mg + b1, niacin, b5, b12, vit e 12mg

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: A targeted brain and heart formula combining Omega-3 fatty acids with Ginkgo Biloba and key B vitamins to simultaneously support cardiovascular function and enhance cerebral circulation, memory, and cognitive performance.
details.How It Works: EPA and DHA support heart rhythm, lower triglycerides, and maintain brain cell membrane fluidity; Ginkgo improves microcirculation and provides neuroprotective antioxidant effects; B vitamins (B1, B12, Niacin) support energy metabolism in brain and heart cells.
details.Indications: Ideal for adults over 40 seeking simultaneous heart and brain health support, those with early cognitive decline, poor concentration, circulatory concerns, or age-related cardiovascular risk.
details.Dosage: 1–2 capsules daily with meals.
details.Interactions: Omega-3 and Ginkgo may both have mild antiplatelet effects — use with extra caution if on anticoagulants (warfarin, clopidogrel). Avoid with MAOIs.
details.Duration of Use: Long-term daily use is recommended for sustained cardiovascular and cognitive benefits.
details.Best Time to Take: With a meal containing fat for optimal Omega-3 and fat-soluble vitamin absorption.
details.Other Therapies: Complements CoQ10 for heart function and Phosphatidylserine for memory support.
details.Precautions: Inform your doctor before use if on anticoagulants. Stop 2 weeks before elective surgery. Not for use during pregnancy without medical advice.

name: Kids omega-3 syrup 250ml
composition: per 15ml: fish oil 535mg (dha 125mg/epa 27mg) + vitamins a, c, d3, e, b1, b2, b6, b12, niacin, pantothenic acid, biotin

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: A complete children's Omega-3 and multivitamin syrup combining DHA-rich fish oil with a full spectrum of essential vitamins to support brain development, cognitive function, vision, immunity, and overall growth in children.
details.How It Works: DHA is the primary structural fatty acid in the developing brain and retina — adequate DHA intake is critical for neurological development. The accompanying vitamin complex provides complete micronutrient support for all aspects of paediatric health.
details.Indications: Suitable for children from 3 years of age. Particularly important for children with limited fish intake, fussy eaters, those with learning or attention concerns, and during periods of rapid growth.
details.Dosage: 15ml (1 tablespoon) once daily with a meal. Shake well before use.
details.Interactions: Generally very safe in children. Contains Vitamin D — monitor total D3 intake if child takes other supplements.
details.Duration of Use: Can be used daily throughout childhood as a nutritional supplement.
details.Best Time to Take: With breakfast for best child compliance and to support daytime brain activity.
details.Other Therapies: Pairs with B Friends Children's Multivitamin Chewable if additional mineral support is needed.
details.Precautions: Contains fish oil — avoid in children with known fish allergy. Store refrigerated after opening. Keep out of reach of young children to prevent accidental overconsumption.

name: Relax & sleep 30 tabs (melatonin + herbs)
composition: melatonin 1mg + hop cones 200mg + melissa leaves 100mg + lavender 30mg + magnesium 56.3mg + vitamin b6

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: A gentle, multi-herbal sleep support formula combining low-dose Melatonin with traditionally used calming herbs (Hops, Lemon Balm, Lavender) and Magnesium to help regulate the biological clock and promote quick, natural sleep onset.
details.How It Works: Melatonin shifts the circadian sleep signal; Hops and Lemon Balm (Melissa) enhance GABAergic inhibitory neurotransmission; Lavender aromatics act on serotonin receptors; Magnesium relaxes muscles and supports melatonin synthesis; B6 supports neurotransmitter conversion.
details.Indications: For adults with mild-to-moderate sleep onset difficulties, jet lag, shift work, stress-related insomnia, and those who prefer a gentle, low-dose herbal approach to sleep support.
details.Dosage: 1 tablet 30 minutes before bedtime.
details.Interactions: May enhance CNS depressants. Avoid with alcohol. Lemon Balm may potentiate sedative medications.
details.Duration of Use: Short to medium-term use (4–8 weeks). Can be used intermittently for travel and shift work.
details.Best Time to Take: 30 minutes before desired bedtime.
details.Other Therapies: Pairs with SR Magnesium Nighttime and good sleep hygiene for a comprehensive sleep programme.
details.Precautions: May cause morning drowsiness — do not drive until you know how this affects you. Not for use during pregnancy. The low 1mg melatonin dose makes this an ideal starting product for melatonin-naive individuals.

name: Aktiv joints ultra 30 caps
composition: glucosamine sulphate 750mg, chondroitin 40mg, collagen hydrolysate 100mg, msm 50mg, hyaluronic acid 7.5mg, vit c 40mg, vit k1 20mcg, vit d3 5mcg

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: Doppelherz Aktiv Joints Ultra is a premium multi-ingredient joint formula combining the most clinically supported joint nutrients to help support cartilage integrity, joint lubrication, reduce inflammation, and maintain full joint mobility.
details.How It Works: Glucosamine provides building blocks for glycosaminoglycan synthesis in cartilage; Chondroitin inhibits cartilage-degrading enzymes; MSM provides sulphur for connective tissue; Collagen and HA support synovial fluid viscosity and joint cushioning; Vitamin C enables collagen cross-linking; D3 and K1 support bone health.
details.Indications: For adults with osteoarthritis, joint stiffness, reduced range of motion, post-injury joint support, and active individuals seeking preventive joint maintenance.
details.Dosage: 1 capsule once daily with a meal.
details.Interactions: Glucosamine may mildly enhance anticoagulant effects. Monitor blood glucose if diabetic.
details.Duration of Use: Allow 4–8 weeks for measurable benefit. Long-term use is encouraged for ongoing joint maintenance.
details.Best Time to Take: With a main meal.
details.Other Therapies: Complements physiotherapy, Omega-3 supplementation, and anti-inflammatory diet for comprehensive joint care.
details.Precautions: Avoid if allergic to shellfish (glucosamine is shellfish-derived). Not recommended during pregnancy. Consult a doctor if on anticoagulants.

name: Omega-3 + folic acid + b6 + b12 30 caps
composition: fish oil 1000mg (epa 180mg/dha 120mg) + vit e 10mg + folic acid 300mcg + b6 3mg + b12 3mcg per capsule

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: A scientifically formulated adult heart health capsule combining Omega-3 fatty acids with the homocysteine-lowering trio of Folic Acid, B6, and B12 — addressing two major cardiovascular risk factors (triglycerides and homocysteine) simultaneously.
details.How It Works: EPA/DHA lower triglycerides and reduce inflammatory cardiovascular mediators; Folic Acid, B6, and B12 together convert homocysteine (an independent cardiovascular risk factor) to harmless methionine, reducing arterial damage and thrombotic risk.
details.Indications: Particularly recommended for adults with elevated homocysteine levels, cardiovascular risk factors, family history of heart disease, and those seeking comprehensive heart health support.
details.Dosage: 1 capsule once daily with a meal.
details.Interactions: May mildly enhance anticoagulant effects. B vitamins interact with levodopa (Parkinson's medications).
details.Duration of Use: Long-term daily use for sustained cardiovascular benefit.
details.Best Time to Take: With a fat-containing meal.
details.Other Therapies: Complements CoQ10, Vitamin K2+D3, and Magnesium for a comprehensive cardiac health programme.
details.Precautions: Consult a doctor if on anticoagulants. Not for use during pregnancy without medical guidance. Homocysteine testing is recommended to monitor supplementation efficacy.

name: Magnesium + calcium + d3 30 tabs
composition: magnesium 250mg + calcium 450mg + vitamin d3 10mcg (400iu) per tablet

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: A convenient all-in-one bone and muscle health tablet combining the three key nutrients — Magnesium, Calcium, and Vitamin D3 — in optimal ratios to help support muscle function and maintain strong, healthy bones.
details.How It Works: Vitamin D3 enhances intestinal calcium and magnesium absorption; Calcium provides the primary mineral matrix for bone; Magnesium activates Vitamin D, supports the parathyroid hormone response, and ensures calcium enters bone tissue.
details.Indications: Suitable for all adults seeking bone health maintenance, the elderly at risk of osteoporosis, post-menopausal women, those with muscle cramps, and individuals with low dietary calcium or magnesium.
details.Dosage: 1 tablet once daily with a meal.
details.Interactions: Separate from iron supplements and tetracycline antibiotics. Fat-soluble D3 requires dietary fat for absorption.
details.Duration of Use: Long-term daily use is safe and recommended for ongoing bone density maintenance.
details.Best Time to Take: With the main meal of the day.
details.Other Therapies: Add Vitamin K2 to direct calcium to bones. Combine with weight-bearing exercise for maximum bone density benefit.
details.Precautions: Do not exceed recommended doses of Vitamin D3 and Calcium without medical monitoring. Consult a doctor if history of kidney stones (calcium-type) or hypercalcaemia.

name: Collagen beauty drinking shots 30 amps
composition: per bottle: collagen peptides 2.5g + acai 100mg + zinc 5mg + vit e 3mg + beta-carotene + copper 0.15mg + biotin 150mcg + vit c 80mg

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: A premium liquid beauty supplement combining hydrolysed collagen peptides with antioxidant-rich Acai, Zinc, Biotin, Vitamin C, and Vitamin E to help deliver smoother, healthier, more youthful-looking skin, stronger nails, and vibrant hair.
details.How It Works: Collagen peptides stimulate dermal fibroblasts to synthesise new collagen; Vitamin C is essential for collagen cross-linking; Zinc and Copper are required for structural protein synthesis; Biotin supports keratin production; Acai berry extract provides powerful antioxidant skin protection.
details.Indications: Designed for adults seeking visible skin rejuvenation, reduction in fine lines, improved skin hydration and elasticity, stronger nails, and healthier hair.
details.Dosage: 1 bottle (shot) once daily. Drink directly or dilute in water.
details.Interactions: Generally free of significant drug interactions. Contains copper — do not combine with additional high-dose copper supplements.
details.Duration of Use: Best results seen after 4–8 weeks of consistent daily use.
details.Best Time to Take: Can be taken at any time. Many prefer it as a morning beauty ritual.
details.Other Therapies: Complements topical skincare, adequate hydration, and sun protection for optimal aesthetic outcomes.
details.Precautions: Contains fish-derived collagen — avoid if allergic to fish. Contains copper — do not exceed combined intake from all sources. Store in a cool place.

name: A-z effervescent multivitamin 15 tabs
composition: 21 micronutrients: vitamins a, b1, b2, b6, b12, c 200mg, d3, e, k + folic acid + biotin + niacin + pantothenic acid + calcium + magnesium + phosphorus + chromium + iodine + molybdenum + selenium + zinc per effervescent tablet

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: A comprehensive 21-micronutrient effervescent multivitamin offering complete daily vitamin and mineral support in a convenient, fast-dissolving format that is particularly enjoyable and easy to absorb.
details.How It Works: Effervescent delivery creates an ionised solution with superior absorption compared to standard tablets. The complete micronutrient profile supports energy metabolism, immune function, antioxidant defence, bone health, thyroid function (iodine), and cellular antioxidant protection (selenium).
details.Indications: Ideal as a daily nutritional insurance supplement for all adults, particularly busy professionals, those with poor dietary variety, athletes, the elderly, and anyone seeking broad-spectrum vitamin and mineral support.
details.Dosage: 1 effervescent tablet dissolved in 200ml of water once daily.
details.Interactions: Contains multiple fat-soluble vitamins — do not combine with additional high-dose Vitamin A or D supplementation without monitoring.
details.Duration of Use: Safe for long-term daily use.
details.Best Time to Take: Morning with or after breakfast.
details.Other Therapies: Provides an excellent nutritional base that can be complemented with specific targeted supplements such as Omega-3 or probiotics.
details.Precautions: Contains sodium (from effervescent formulation) — consider this in individuals on sodium-restricted diets. Inform doctor if taking with other supplements or medications for interactions screening.

name: Lacta+ breastfeeding support 30 caps
composition: per 2 capsules: calcium 300mg + anise seed 50mg + dill herb 50mg + fennel seed 100mg + iron 8mg + iodine 100mcg + vit d3 + b1 + b2 + b6 + pantothenic acid + niacin + biotin 100mcg

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: Lacta+ is a specialised lactation supplement combining galactogenic herbs (Anise, Dill, Fennel) with critical nutritional needs of breastfeeding mothers (Calcium, Iron, Iodine, Vitamins) to help support adequate breast milk production and maternal health.
details.How It Works: The trio of Anise, Dill, and Fennel seeds are traditional galactagogues (milk-production supporters) containing phytoestrogens and volatile oils that stimulate prolactin activity. The vitamins and minerals replenish the high nutritional demands of lactation.
details.Indications: Specifically designed for breastfeeding mothers from delivery onwards to support milk production, replenish nutritional stores depleted by lactation, and support both maternal and infant health.
details.Dosage: 2 capsules once daily, preferably with food.
details.Interactions: Contains Iron — separate from tetracycline antibiotics and calcium supplements by 2 hours. Iodine may interact with thyroid medications — inform your doctor.
details.Duration of Use: Safe throughout the entire breastfeeding period.
details.Best Time to Take: With a meal at any time of day.
details.Other Therapies: Complements postnatal multivitamin supplementation and adequate hydration for comprehensive lactation support.
details.Precautions: For use only by breastfeeding mothers. Do not use during pregnancy without medical guidance. Consult a doctor or pharmacist if on thyroid medication due to iodine content. Fennel and Anise should be avoided in women with hormone-sensitive conditions.

name: Vitamin c 1000mg + vitamin d3
composition: vitamin c 1000mg + vitamin d3 20mcg (800iu) per tablet

details.Overview &amp Key Benefits: A targeted immune-boosting duo combining high-dose Vitamin C with Vitamin D3 — the two most evidence-based micronutrients for immune system support — in a single daily tablet to help strengthen immune defences year-round.
details.How It Works: Vitamin C stimulates the production and function of white blood cells (neutrophils, lymphocytes), enhances barrier function, and neutralises free radicals. Vitamin D3 activates innate and adaptive immune pathways, including antimicrobial peptide production, and regulates inflammatory immune responses.
details.Indications: For all adults seeking strong daily immune support, particularly during cold and flu season, in individuals with Vitamin D deficiency (common in East Africa despite sun exposure), and during and after illness.
details.Dosage: 1 tablet once daily with a meal.
details.Interactions: Vitamin C enhances iron absorption. Vitamin D3 is fat-soluble — take with food.
details.Duration of Use: Safe for long-term daily use as primary immune support supplementation.
details.Best Time to Take: With the main meal of the day.
details.Other Therapies: Excellent standalone immune support or as a base to which Zinc Elderberry Lozenges or Echinacea can be added during active illness.
details.Precautions: Do not combine with additional high-dose Vitamin D3 supplements without monitoring blood levels. Very high dose Vitamin C (>2000mg/day) may cause loose stools. Consult a doctor if on immunosuppressant therapy.
